name: Last Stretch
short_description: Dive into this short linear action-adventure where you grapple towards enemies to unleash powerful attacks. This 30-minute game is a fast-paced adventure enhanced by colorful effects.
detailed_description:
Dive into this short linear action-adventure where you grapple towards enemies to unleash powerful attacks. This 30-minute game is a fast-paced adventure enhanced by colorful effects. Use your grappling ability to zip through the world, dodging lasers and bullets while wreaking havoc on anything in your path. Escape relentless aliens armed with vibrant, deadly, one-hit kill weapons. With a fast-paced die-retry system, you'll make bold, risky moves—chaining attacks between enemies in style.

• Crafted entirely by our dedicated team, including the original music.

• Easy to pick up, quick to play, and an entirely unique adventure.

supported_languages:
English*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Dutch*, Portuguese - Portugal*
*languages with full audio support
